Payment received.

Now let's schedule your first session.

Forwarding you to the calendar…

You'll be redirected to the booking calendar in a moment. Pick the time that works for you. A confirmation email and a Google Meet link will be sent automatically.

Not redirecting?

If the page doesn't move automatically, click the link below to schedule your session:

Open the booking calendar →

If you run into any trouble, text or call 416-771-0382 and your slot will be reserved manually.
